# Oregon Consumer Privacy Act

Jurisdiction: United States - Oregon
Region: US-OR
Citation: Oregon Consumer Privacy Act
Authority: Oregon Legislature
Source URL: https://olis.oregonlegislature.gov/liz/2023R1/Measures/Overview/SB619
Topics: notice_transparency, consent, sensitive_data, data_subject_rights, third_party_sharing, automated_decision_making, marketing_opt_out, accountability
Keywords: Oregon Consumer Privacy Act, OCPA, sensitive data, targeted advertising

## Summary
Oregon comprehensive consumer privacy law with controller duties, rights, opt-outs, sensitive-data controls, and assessments.

## Key compliance obligations
- Provide consumer rights and appeal mechanisms.
- Obtain consent for sensitive data where required.
- Support sale, targeted-advertising, and profiling opt-outs.
